news.title: Private preview is forming
news.subtitle: The first FLAW waitlist wave is being prepared.
news.text: FLAW is still in pre-release. This page will be used for short launch notes, access updates and important status changes before the first public build.

news.title: Waitlist is open
news.subtitle: Early access notifications are collected before launch.
news.text: Users can leave an email in the waitlist modal. The current form is visual-only until the real backend is connected.
